records.Name: Delta Dental PPO™ Children's Dental PPO for Small Businesses
records.Description__c: Pediatric Essential Health Benefits dental plan for Small Business groups. Covers enrollees up to age 19. No annual maximum. Out-of-Pocket Maximum $350 individual / $700 family (in-network PPO providers only). Medically necessary orthodontia covered with prior authorization.
records.Highlights__c:
• No Annual Maximum — unlimited dental benefits for covered children
  • 100% Preventive Coverage — in-network exams, cleanings, and X-rays at no cost
  • $350 Out-of-Pocket Maximum per child per year (in-network)
  • Orthodontia Covered — medically necessary cases with prior authorization
  • Delta Dental PPO Network — largest dental network in California

records.Name: Delta Dental PPO™ Family Dental PPO for Small Businesses
records.Description__c: Family dental PPO plan covering both adult and pediatric enrollees. Adults (age 19+) have a $1,500 annual maximum and a 6-month waiting period for major services (waivable with proof of prior coverage). Children under 19 have no annual maximum. Orthodontia covered for enrollees under age 19 only (medically necessary).
records.Highlights__c:
• Family Coverage — adults and children covered under one plan
  • $1,500 Annual Maximum per adult member
  • No Annual Maximum for children under age 19
  • 100% Preventive — cleanings, exams, and X-rays covered in full (in-network)
  • 6-Month Waiting Period Waivable for major services with prior coverage proof
  • Pediatric Ortho Covered — medically necessary cases

records.Name: Delta Dental PPO™ Plus Premier — Core Plan
records.Description__c: Core small business dental PPO plan with no waiting periods. $1,000 annual maximum and $1,000 orthodontia lifetime maximum. Access to both Delta PPO and Delta Premier networks.
records.Highlights__c:
• No Waiting Periods — all covered services available from day one
  • $1,000 Annual Maximum per member
  • Orthodontia Included — $1,000 lifetime maximum
  • Dual Network Access — Delta PPO + Delta Premier providers
  • 60% Major Services Coverage (in-network)

records.Name: Delta Dental PPO™ Plus Premier — Enhanced Plan
records.Description__c: Enhanced dental PPO plan with higher annual maximum and richer major service coverage. Best-in-class small business option with 80% major services coverage.
records.Highlights__c:
• $2,000 Annual Maximum — highest benefit level available
  • 80% Major Services coverage (in-network) — root canals, crowns, extractions
  • $1,500 Orthodontia Lifetime Max
  • No Waiting Periods
  • 100% Preventive care

records.Name: DeltaVision™ VSP — Essential Vision
records.Description__c: Essential vision plan administered by VSP (Vision Service Plan). Covers annual eye exams, frames or contacts allowance, and lens options. Administered by Delta Dental of California.
records.Highlights__c:
• Annual Eye Exam — $0 copay in-network
  • $150 Frame Allowance per year
  • $200 Contact Lens Allowance (in lieu of glasses)
  • VSP Network — largest vision provider network nationally
  • $0 Deductible

records.Name: DeltaVision™ VSP — Premier Vision
records.Description__c: Premier vision plan with enhanced frame and contact lens allowances. Includes progressive lens coverage and anti-reflective coating.
records.Highlights__c:
• $200 Frame Allowance per year (20% off above allowance)
  • $300 Contact Lens Allowance
  • Progressive Lenses Covered
  • Anti-Reflective Coating Covered
  • VSP Signature Network access
